title: Xodium
description: A lightweight Fabric mod that lets you trade memory usage against stability
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60432ec3e7ccb251e45390185c535ac3ef9caa6a_0.webp)
![Xodium](https://img.shields.io/badge/Xodium-Memory%20Optimizer-blue)
![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Beta-orange)

**Xodium – Memory Optimization Mod for Minecraft**

Xodium is a lightweight mod focused on reducing RAM usage and minimizing garbage collection pauses in Minecraft. Designed for both vanilla and modded environments, it improves memory efficiency, stabilizes performance in large worlds, and smooths gameplay in memory-heavy scenarios.

**Key Features:**

Reduces object allocations and temporary memory usage
Implements object pooling for frequently used structures
Optimizes chunk, entity, and NBT data handling
Minimizes garbage collection spikes for smoother performance
Compatible with Sodium, Lithium, and other optimization mods

Perfect for players running heavy modpacks or servers, Xodium ensures stable, long-lasting gameplay without sacrificing compatibility or ease of use.

![9% ram rtx 3060](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d45afe897c41811fb8e5ce80f4524b421d559b8e.png)
![19% ram 3060](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d803ac43de0fe101ef809d6881409bc523049c2.png)
